title: Ra`amyah` #7485
definition:
Raamiah = "thunder of Jehovah"

 1) one who returned from exile with Zerubbabel
    1a) also 'Reelaiah'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Raamiah = "thunder of Jehovah"

 1) one who returned from exile with Zerubbabel
    1a) also 'Reelaiah'

    NASB:  perh. thunder of Yah, an Isr. who returned with Zerubbabel
